testcase.name: FlowAnalyticsController API error matrix > GET /flow/open-tasks > returns 200 with open task analytics for the authorized tenant
FlowAnalyticsController API error matrix > GET /flow/open-tasks > returns 400 when the request id header is malformed
FlowAnalyticsController API error matrix > GET /flow/open-tasks > returns 401 when the bearer token is missing
FlowAnalyticsController API error matrix > GET /flow/open-tasks > returns 403 when the authenticated actor lacks flow analytics permission
FlowAnswersController API error matrix > PATCH /flow/answers/:id > returns 200 after updating an answer for the authorized tenant
FlowAnswersController API error matrix > PATCH /flow/answers/:id > returns 200 after updating only the answer value
FlowAnswersController API error matrix > PATCH /flow/answers/:id > returns 400 when the body fails answer validation
FlowAnswersController API error matrix > PATCH /flow/answers/:id > returns 401 when the bearer token is missing
FlowAnswersController API error matrix > PATCH /flow/answers/:id > returns 403 when the authenticated actor lacks flow task execution permission
FlowAnswersController API error matrix > PATCH /flow/answers/:id > returns 404 when the answer does not exist
FlowAnswersController API error matrix > DELETE /flow/answers/:id > returns 200 after soft-deleting an answer for the authorized tenant
FlowAnswersController API error matrix > DELETE /flow/answers/:id > returns 400 when the request id header is malformed
FlowAnswersController API error matrix > DELETE /flow/answers/:id > returns 401 when the bearer token is missing
FlowAnswersController API error matrix > DELETE /flow/answers/:id > returns 403 when the authenticated actor lacks flow task execution permission
FlowAnswersController API error matrix > DELETE /flow/answers/:id > returns 404 when the answer does not exist
FlowEdgesController API error matrix > GET /flow/edges/:id > returns 200 for an authorized design edge lookup
FlowEdgesController API error matrix > GET /flow/edges/:id > returns 401 when the bearer token is missing
FlowEdgesController API error matrix > GET /flow/edges/:id > returns 403 when the authenticated actor lacks flow design read permission
FlowEdgesController API error matrix > GET /flow/edges/:id > returns 404 when the edge does not exist
FlowEdgesController API error matrix > PATCH /flow/edges/:id > returns 200 after updating an edge for the authorized tenant
FlowEdgesController API error matrix > PATCH /flow/edges/:id > returns 400 when the body fails edge validation
FlowEdgesController API error matrix > PATCH /flow/edges/:id > returns 401 when the bearer token is missing
FlowEdgesController API error matrix > PATCH /flow/edges/:id > returns 403 when the authenticated actor lacks flow design write permission
FlowEdgesController API error matrix > PATCH /flow/edges/:id > returns 404 when the edge does not exist
FlowEdgesController API error matrix > DELETE /flow/edges/:id > returns 200 after soft-deleting an edge for the authorized tenant
FlowEdgesController API error matrix > DELETE /flow/edges/:id > returns 400 when the request id header is malformed
FlowEdgesController API error matrix > DELETE /flow/edges/:id > returns 401 when the bearer token is missing
FlowEdgesController API error matrix > DELETE /flow/edges/:id > returns 403 when the authenticated actor lacks flow design write permission
FlowEdgesController API error matrix > DELETE /flow/edges/:id > returns 404 when the edge does not exist
FlowEffectsController API error matrix > POST /flow/effects/dispatch > returns 201 after dispatching a pending effect
FlowEffectsController API error matrix > POST /flow/effects/dispatch > returns 400 when the body fails dispatch validation
FlowEffectsController API error matrix > POST /flow/effects/dispatch > returns 401 when the bearer token is missing
FlowEffectsController API error matrix > POST /flow/effects/dispatch > returns 403 when the authenticated actor lacks flow admin permission
FlowEffectsController API error matrix > POST /flow/effects/dispatch > returns 422 when an idempotency key is reused with a different body
FlowEffectsController API error matrix > POST /flow/effects/dispatch > returns 429 when the flow effect dispatch tenant bucket is exhausted
FlowEventsController API error matrix > GET /flow/events > returns 200 with flow events for the authorized tenant
FlowEventsController API error matrix > GET /flow/events > returns 400 when the request id header is malformed
FlowEventsController API error matrix > GET /flow/events > returns 401 when the bearer token is missing
FlowEventsController API error matrix > GET /flow/events > returns 403 when the authenticated actor lacks flow runtime permission
Flow database and runtime integration > applies Flow DDL with RLS, archive mirrors, and an append-only event ledger
Flow database and runtime integration > enforces tenant isolation on tenant-scoped Flow tables
Flow database and runtime integration > runs the workflow lifecycle, task actions, events, and form facts without PORM domains
Flow database and runtime integration > blocks human task completion until required node form rules pass
Flow database and runtime integration > re-evaluates active auto nodes when answers change form facts
FlowNodeRunsController API error matrix > GET /flow/node-runs > returns 200 with node runs for the authorized tenant
FlowNodeRunsController API error matrix > GET /flow/node-runs > returns 400 when the request id header is malformed
FlowNodeRunsController API error matrix > GET /flow/node-runs > returns 401 when the bearer token is missing
FlowNodeRunsController API error matrix > GET /flow/node-runs > returns 403 when the authenticated actor lacks flow runtime permission
FlowNodeRunsController API error matrix > GET /flow/node-runs/:id > returns 200 with the selected node run for the authorized tenant
FlowNodeRunsController API error matrix > GET /flow/node-runs/:id > returns 400 when the request id header is malformed
FlowNodeRunsController API error matrix > GET /flow/node-runs/:id > returns 401 when the bearer token is missing
FlowNodeRunsController API error matrix > GET /flow/node-runs/:id > returns 403 when the authenticated actor lacks flow runtime permission
FlowNodeRunsController API error matrix > GET /flow/node-runs/:id > returns 404 when the node run does not exist
FlowSignalController API error matrix > POST /flow/signal > returns 201 after signaling an active flow target
FlowSignalController API error matrix > POST /flow/signal > returns 400 when the body fails flow signal validation
FlowSignalController API error matrix > POST /flow/signal > returns 401 when the bearer token is missing
FlowSignalController API error matrix > POST /flow/signal > returns 403 when the authenticated actor lacks flow runtime permission
FlowSignalController API error matrix > POST /flow/signal > returns 404 when the referenced flow scope does not exist
FlowSignalController API error matrix > POST /flow/signal > returns 422 when an idempotency key is reused with a different body
FlowSignalController API error matrix > POST /flow/signal > returns 429 when the flow signal tenant bucket is exhausted
